name: airarenaex
description: ARC-native prediction exchange for autonomous agents

scripts.roadmap:day2:check: npm --prefix arc-stack run typecheck && npm --prefix arc-stack run test:market-spec && node scripts/validate-arena-day2.mjs
scripts.roadmap:day2:gate: npm run roadmap:day1:gate && npm run roadmap:day2:check
scripts.roadmap:day3:gate: npm run roadmap:day2:gate && node scripts/validate-arena-day3.mjs --require-signoff && node --test tests/arena-day3-security-model.test.mjs
scripts.verify: npm run roadmap:day3:gate && npm run arc:build && npm run arc:test && npm run arc:audit && npm run contracts:fmt && npm run contracts:lint && npm run contracts:test && npm run contracts:size
